title: Basic JavaScript Sorting Algorithms
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Sorting Algorithms. Focus on implementing Merge sort (divide and conquer) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Sorting Algorithms
description: Create a function that uses Merge sort (divide and conquer) and Quicksort (pivot partitioning) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Sorting Algorithms Project
description: Build a small application that applies Merge sort (divide and conquer), Quicksort (pivot partitioning), Heapsort (heap data structure) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Sorting Algorithms
description: The following code has bugs related to Merge sort (divide and conquer). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Sorting Algorithms
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Merge sort (divide and conquer) and Quicksort (pivot partitioning).
